name: Measurement & Data 4th
description: Unit conversions, area, perimeter, angles, and data representation
objectives: Convert between different units of measurement
Solve problems involving measurement and conversion
Find area and perimeter of rectangles
Apply measurement concepts to real-world problems

ai.guidelines: Focus on unit conversions (metric and customary), area and perimeter formulas, line plots with fractions, angles and angle measurement, solving problems involving measurement
